productDisplayName: Baggit Women Red Famous Taj Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Dimensions: 14 cm x 10.5 cm Crafted from genuine leather, has a three-fold flap style opening with a magnetic button closure Velvet overlay on the flap with a buckle detail Detachable shoulder strap to convert wallet into a sling bag One pocket on the side Two pockets, one card holder and one photo id on the left fold One coin pocket on the centre fold A zippered pocket on the back Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
